task: I need to answer a neighborhood invitation and keep it brief because I’m trying to get a few things done at home. Can you help me word a short reply that’s polite and doesn’t invite a long conversation?

turns.agent_response:
Absolutely — here are a few short, polite options:

- **Thanks so much for the invitation! I won’t be able to make it, but I hope it’s a great time.**
- **That sounds lovely — thanks for thinking of me. I’m going to pass this time, but enjoy!**
- **Really appreciate the invite! I can’t join, but I hope you all have a wonderful time.**
- **Thanks for including me. I’m not able to come, but I hope it goes well!**

If you want, I can make it sound a little warmer, more casual, or more formal.

user_simulator.text: That’ll do. Short and polite. I’d probably use: **Thanks for the invite, but I can’t make it. Hope y’all have a good time.**
